title: grants — tenancy hooks
description: Per-tenant lifecycle callbacks (#[AsTenancyHook]) this module contributes. One hook: GrantCacheWarmerHook — pre-populates the L2 Redis cache for the tenant on tenant init so the first request of the day is warm.

hooks.name: GrantCacheWarmerHook
hooks.purpose: On tenant context init (first request per tenant per worker), read the top-N most-recently-accessed grants for the tenant into the L2 Redis evaluation cache. N configurable via settings.grants.cache.warm_top_grants (default 100). Off-request — fires on the tenant-initialization side channel, doesn't add to request latency.

notes: The GrantCacheWarmerHook is distinct from the `grants.warm_grant_cache` HTTP middleware. The middleware warms per-CALLER (auth_user); the hook warms per-TENANT. Together, cold-tenant + cold-worker + cold-caller cases all land warm.
Feature-flag gated (`grants.cache-warm`) so ops can disable warming during incidents. When off, first-request-per-tenant pays the DB cost — acceptable for correctness.
